title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXCV. Games.
content:
See, Saw, Margery Daw,
        Sold her bed and lay upon straw;
        Was not she a dirty slut,
        To sell her bed and lie in the dirt!
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCXCV. Games.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
